# hash-checker

Dosyalarin hash'lerini toplu dogrulayan arac. SHA256/MD5/SHA1.

## Install

```bash
pip install hash-checker
# veya
git clone https://github.com/kullanici/hash-checker.git
cd hash-checker
pip install -e .
```

## Usage

```bash
python -m hash_checker --help
```

## Tags

security, hash, cli
